r_status":"valid"},"statement_root":"sha256:c10955df63762a966a82289b37a363fa9824eb175c45c68272ca173d58fca52f"},"schema":"science.lock.v0","signatures":[{"algorithm":"ed25519","key_id":"fixture:adr004-standards-baseline","payload_type":"application/vnd.science.lock+json","public_key_hex":"d75a980182b10ab7d54bfed3c964073a0ee172f3daa62325af021a68f707511a","scope":"internal_fixture_non_authority","signature_hex":"bfa3c507cfc1d56757db23287b12c4ad185f326e20eeb50d33e869ee874bcc69c480531c8ba37b6ee23a04d8cdc3ced8833298fafa8930579e538c698159250d"}]}}],"checker":{"argv":["graph-parent-checker","--input-root","sha256:7032f5b4d6e1cb2cf973753a6f0b703cdba0dcf74579471b09d60ab724e3a021"],"checker_id":"graph-parent-checker-v1","executable_root":"sha256:9fbd47b3eecdfb00918527b6faafe107dcd285c9a54e34e2f9f60a95076f7724","expected_outcome":"pass","frozen_transcript_root":"sha256:4aefdb15045e61179d0971742e4af96c2df1c7e26f20078624bcc02f265019f6","input_root":"sha256:7032f5b4d6e1cb2cf973753a6f0b703cdba0dcf74579471b09d60ab724e3a021","note":"Synthetic The agent receives the frozen result and may not invoke tools; this is not independent reproduction evidence.","schema":"canopus.composition-checker-fixture.v0"},"fact_manifest_roots":{"correction":"sha256:98d48093727687049f02ed9989fff0772f42fca5edd29a91356ce0b7b449d089","fork":"sha256:c1264ce6adab954ae428268d27959f3b6ce534b5974a0bc08182928625181633","unchanged":"sha256:c06718a3c14ae3dddb6f1d577f71bdd1f41fb0472eff2892b8bddc112c2ed1ad"},"primary_fact_manifest_root":"sha256:c06718a3c14ae3dddb6f1d577f71bdd1f41fb0472eff2892b8bddc112c2ed1ad","schema":"canopus.composition-stage-a-context.v0","semantics":{"root":"sha256:4ad95ca2e75c5aafd98c0056a0d651f42b4703e5b69564d778bd183399610736","text":"# Standards baseline semantics v0\n\nThe shared `vela.verifiable-composition.fact-manifest.v0` contract is the only\ndefinition of dependency standing used by both Stage A arms. Every manifest is\ncanonical JSON containing only null, booleans, strings, lists, objects, and\nsafe integers. Floats and integers outside JavaScript's exact safe range are\ninvalid so an independent TypeScript reader derives the same full root.\n\nThe L arm carries each exact manifest in an in-toto Statement, an unsigned DSSE\nenvelope, and a fixture-signed `science.lock`. The fixture identity is public,\ndeterministic, non-human, and explicitly outside scientific authority. The V\narm carries the same manifest through the Vela fact envelope and removable\nread-only resolution, correction-CI, and context projections.\n\nA verified same or descendant lineage with accepted finding standing, a valid\ndecision, valid verifier material, and available evidence is `satisfied`. A\nverified hard-premise correction or supersession is `review_required`. A valid\nnon-descendant lineage is `forked`. Missing or invalid continuity, evidence,\ndecision, verifier, or change-event material is `unresolvable`. Withdrawal or\nrevocation blocks hard, data, and method premises; soft and contextual roles\nremain review-only.\n\nEvery projection is non-authoritative, rebuildable, read-only, and reports\n`child_truth = not_assessed`, `child_mutation = none`, and\n`authority_effect = none`. A parent correction changes dependency standing; it\ndoes not prove the child false, edit a Receipt, sign, accept, apply, finalize,\nor create an authority event.\n"},"task_id":"later_root_classification"}
